videoSnippet.title: A Blitz Battle for the Ages || Magnus vs Nodirbek || FIDE World Blitz Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2785) - Carlsen, Magnus (2869) 
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [02-01] 2026.06.21
B35 Sicilian, accelerated fianchetto, modern variation with Bc4

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 g6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Bg7 5.Nc3 Nc6 6.Be3 Nf6 7.Bc4 Qa5 8.O-O O-O 9.Bb3 d6 10.h3 Bd7 11.f4 Nxd4 12.Bxd4 Bc6 13.Qd3 Nd7 14.Bxg7 Kxg7 15.Rae1 Qc5+ 16.Kh2 Rac8 17.Qg3 b5 18.e5 dxe5 19.f5 a5 20.a4 bxa4 21.Nxa4 Qb4 22.Ra1 Nf6 23.Qxe5 Qe4 24.Qg3 Nh5 25.Qf2 Qe5+ 26.g3 gxf5 27.Nb6 Rcd8 28.Nc4 Qc7 29.Rxa5 Be4 30.Rc5 Qd7 31.g4 Nf6 32.gxf5 Kh8 33.Qf4 Rg8 34.Ne3 Qd2+ 35.Rf2 Qc1 36.Ng4 Qh1+ 37.Kg3 Nh5+
